SpTU 5, 263 [Enuma Anu Enlil commentary][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[...] ⸢DUNGU SA₅ TE⸣ [...]

[...] it approaches a red cloud [...]

o 2'2'

[...] BA A DU : * <<KAM>> ina iti⸢GAN U₄ 1-KAM⸣ [...]

[...] ... blows. : (If) in Kislimu (IX) on the 1st day [...]

o 3'3'

[...] x : di-il-ḫu ⸢u? ner?⸣-tu₂ GAL₂-ma : ⸢ḫi⸣-[pi₂]

[...] ... : there will be confusion and murder : (gloss: break)

o 4'4'

[...] ⸢GU₇⸣ : ina mul₃MAŠ.TAB.BA GAL.GAL u-lid ḫi-pi₂

[...] will devour. : (If) she gave birth in the Great Twins (gloss: break)

o 5'5'

[...] ina mul₃MAŠ.TAB.BA GAL.GAL : ana u₂-kul-tu₄ d<x> ḫi-pi₂

[...] in the Great Twins : for the devouring of the god (gloss: break)

o 6'6'

[... x]-⸢kin?⸣-tu₄ dIŠKUR ša₂ ina itiSIG₄ iq-bu-u₂ ḫi-pi₂

[...] ... of Adad, of which it is said in Simanu (III) (gloss: break)

o 7'7'

[...] x dUTU RAiṣ ḫi-pi₂<d>30 RAiṣ : : ḫi-pi₂

[...] ... the Sun will devastate. (gloss: break) the Moon will devastate. : : (gloss: break)

o 8'8'

[...] x ba-aʾ-<lu> ḫi-pi₂ eš-šu₂<iṣ>-ru-uḫ-ma ḫi-pi₂

[...] ... bright (gloss: new break) it flares and (gloss: break)

o 9'9'

[...] x-a-tu₂ aš-šum a-ra-qu ḫi-pi₂

[...] ... because "to be(come) yellow green" (gloss: break)

o 10'10'

[...] x x x x DI DUNGU ḫi-pi₂

[...] ... cloud (gloss: break)

o 11'11'

[...] ša₂? x [...] ḫi-pi₂

[...] of ... [...] (gloss: break)

o 12'12'

rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
r 1'r 1'

[...] a-na 2? x x x ⸢DUNGU⸣ [...]

[...] for 2 ... cloud [...]

r 2'2'

[...]-⸢AM₃⸣ GU₇ : tu₁₅KUR.RA ša₂ KURḫa dUTU ana? A? [...]

[...] will devour ... : east, of (where) the Sun rises, to ... [...]

r 3'3'

[...] x : ša₂-qu-u : * ina itiDU₆ U₄ 1-KAM 2 ZA₃-šu₂ GAL [...]

[...] ... (means) : to be high. : (If) in Tašritu (VII) on the 1st day 2 are big on its right [...]

r 4'4'

[...] ša₂-niš DUNGU SIG₇ ina 15 dUTU DU-ma : * ina itiAPIN U₄ 1-⸢KAM⸣

[...] alternatively, yellow-green cloud blows on the right of the Sun. : (If) in Arahsamnu (VIII) on the 1st day

r 5'5'

[... mul₃MAŠ.TAB.BA] ⸢GAL⸣.GAL : * ina DUNGU raq-qa-tu₄ IGI-ma im?-la ana gi-ne₂-e

[...] Great Twins. : (If) it appears in thin cloud and regularly becomes full

r 6'6'

[...] x ina? 15! la DI?-is? sa-da-ri : šu-tar-ku-ba!(SU) x [...]

[...] ... on the right is not .... to do regularly : layered ... [...]

r 7'7'

[...] ⸢LUGAL?⸣ ZU ⸢MA⸣ AN i-dan-nin : * ina itiGAN U₄ 1-KAM 2? [...]

[...] the king of ... will become strong. : (If) in Kislimu (IX) on the 1st day 2 [...]

r 8'8'

[...] SIG₇? SA₅?-ma? : * DUNGU NIG₂.⸢ŠU⸣ lib-bu-šu₂ DIRI [...]

[...] is yellow-green (or) red. : (If) cloud drifts (with) objects belonging to it [...]
